extraction_notes: Claim-contradiction packet. Extract corrections, retractions, denials, court findings, disputed wording, date conflicts, and source-chain caveats. Do not collapse contradictions into a single resolved fact unless the source record supports the resolution.

source_span_guidance.instruction: Use source_spans for exact contradiction anchors: page, paragraph, timestamp, docket item, exhibit, correction notice, quote offset, or retraction section.

claim_placeholder_examples.notes: List contradicted claim IDs in contradicts when the source directly disputes them.
Use false_or_retracted only when a correction, retraction, court record, or reliable source directly supports that status.

review_defaults.recommendation: update claim status only after source-backed review
